title: Ensuring best practice in genomics education: A scoping review of genomics education needs assessments and evaluations.
author: Nisselle A Terrill B Janinski M Metcalfe S Gaff C
content: S-EPMC11339611 PMC11339611 Ensuring best practice in genomics education: A scoping review of genomics education needs assessments and evaluations. A health workforce capable of implementing genomic medicine requires effective genomics education. Genomics education interventions developed for health
